zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空延续
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD整体处于弱势震荡格局，价格围绕63800一线徘徊，短线偏空上方64000附近承压明显，整体结构偏空整理

MACD指标持续为负值运行，动能柱缩减但仍未翻正，显示空头动能占优同时价格持续位于20日均线下方，均线系统压制明显延续

下方支撑关注63830与整数关口63800，若失守或进一步走弱上方压力在64000及64690均线附近反弹需放量确认短期谨慎

操作上建议以反弹做空思路为主，未站稳64000前避免追多并注意控制仓位与止损

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently trading around 63,854, showing a marginal 24-hour decline and reflecting a generally cautious market tone. Price action remains compressed near the lower boundary of the intraday range, suggesting limited bullish momentum. Trading below the 20-period SMA at 64,690 indicates short-term bearish pressure. Overall structure points to a consolidation phase with a slight downward bias as buyers struggle to reclaim higher ground.

Momentum indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. MACD stands at -406.14, signaling strong negative momentum and sustained selling pressure in the short term. Without an RSI reading, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be confirmed, but price stability near the range low suggests indecision rather than accumulation. The lack of bullish divergence implies buyers have not yet regained control of trend direction.

Key technical levels show immediate support around 63,800, aligning with the recent intraday low. A breakdown below this zone could expose 63,500 followed by a deeper support area near 63,000, where stronger demand may emerge. On the upside, initial resistance sits at the 20-day SMA near 64,690, followed by 65,000 and 65,500, which represent critical zones for trend reversal confirmation.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound approach until a decisive breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support around 63,800 with tight risk control, targeting moves toward 64,690 resistance. Alternatively, rejection near the SMA could offer short opportunities toward lower support zones. A sustained breakout above 65,000 would be required to shift bias bullish, while stops should remain tight due to compressed volatility. Market participation remains low, increasing the importance of patience and confirmation before entries.
